title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills and other features to automate work. The video covers three strategies: agents, hooks, and loops/scheduling, and identifies two underutilized powerful features in Claude Code.
